title: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
friendlyTitle: daily_stock_analysis: AI stock reports on a schedule
summary: daily_stock_analysis is an LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system covering market data, news, fundamentals, technical indicators and automated decision reports. It supports scheduled runs and notifications across workplace messaging tools.
friendlySummary: This repo uses AI to collect market data and news, then create stock analysis reports automatically.
whyItMatters: Use it as a reference for building AI-assisted market dashboards, scheduled financial briefings or workflow automations that combine data retrieval, LLM analysis and notifications.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help builders learn how to combine data, AI summaries and scheduled alerts in one workflow.
